---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for ApplyCraft
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: biroue10
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the problem or gap this feature would address.
e.g. *"I always have to manually reformat dates when switching templates..."*

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried or thought about.

## Who would benefit from this?

- [ ] All users
- [ ] Users writing CVs in RTL languages (Arabic, Hebrew, Farsi)
- [ ] Users writing CVs in French / other non-English languages
- [ ] Users targeting ATS-heavy hiring processes
- [ ] Users exporting to DOCX
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional context

Mockups, screenshots, or links to examples that illustrate the idea.
